category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a casino text-console game; SourceForge project files page describes gpcslots2 as an open source casino text-console game.

docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page is the best official documentation surface found; no separate official manual or docs site was identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project/files pages show released source archive but no official source-control repository was identified.
